---
title: "A Layered Grammar of Graphics"
---

## Project Overview

This poster summarizes Hadley Wickham's paper *A Layered Grammar of Graphics* and explores the theoretical foundation of ggplot2.

## Poster

<iframe
src="poster.pdf"
width="100%"
height="900">
</iframe>

## Reflection

This project helped me better understand how visualization tools are designed and why ggplot2 is structured around reusable graphical components.
